title: Zero-to-Run
summary: Install, configure, troubleshoot, and safely run the core builder surfaces and runtimes.
goal: I installed the stack, I can run it, and I can recover when something breaks.

title: Zero-to-Build
summary: Use Claude tools, builder assets, and automation primitives to perform real work.
goal: I can use these tools to get useful outputs on real projects.

title: Zero-to-Ground
summary: Ground assistants in files, retrieval, and evidence instead of guesses.
goal: My system works from real knowledge, not only plausible language.

title: Zero-to-Orchestrate
summary: Coordinate roles, workflows, runtimes, and review loops.
goal: I can design workflows that are bigger than one prompt or one agent.

title: Zero-to-Ship
summary: Deploy, observe, secure, and package the system for real use.
goal: I can ship what I built and defend it with evidence.
